member.name: T:HookCall
member.summary:
Specifies a call to a hook from within a transaction.

Often the hook's entity is implied by the nature of the call site. For example, when using an account allowance hook inside a crypto transfer, the hook's entity is necessarily the account whose authorization is required.

For future extension points where the hook owner is not forced by the context, we include the option to fully specify the hook id for the call.

member.name: M:HookCall.#ctor(System.Int64,EvmHookCall)
member.summary: Create a HookCall with a numeric hook ID.
member.param: the numeric ID of the hook to call

member.name: P:HookCall.HookId
member.returns: the numeric hook ID, or null if using full hook ID

member.name: P:HookCall.EvmHookCall
member.summary: Get the EVM hook call details.

member.name: M:HookCall.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Convert this HookCall to a protobuf message.
